{{Infobox technique
| name = Fox Mirror
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Fox]] Mirror is a versatile [[Forger technique]] belonging to the [[Path of the White Fox]]. It functions by creating convincing, though physically fragile, illusions that can be used for various tactical purposes. Users can employ the technique to project decoys, such as a fake wall or an image of themselves sleeping, to distract or mislead enemies. Advanced applications allow for complete invisibility by concealing a person's spiritual presence and subtly directing the attention of others away from them. While these illusions lack substantial physical mass, they can be combined with other abilities, such as creating a reinforced shield disguised by an illusion of smoke. Because the technique relies on [[White Fox]] [[madra]], its effectiveness often depends on the skill and specialization of the practitioner.}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fox Mirror]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Fox Mirror technique]] to create an illusion.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silent King]]'s technique was like the [[Fox Mirror]] from the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fox Mirror]] is a technique [[Kelsa]] uses to create a fake wall.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Fox Mirror]] is a [[construct]] that can turn someone invisible.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Fox Mirror]] is a versatile technique used to craft fragile illusions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Fox Mirror]] was used by [[Wei Jin Sairus]] to attempt to sneak away invisibly.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
